event: Still Life with Brass Bowl, Fruit, and Red Box
description: A still life painting against a very dark background. On a tabletop, a silver or pewter plate holds several ripe peaches or apricots and clusters of dark grapes. Behind the plate, a dark glass goblet stands beside a small red box or container. To the right, a large, dark copper or brass bowl with a reflective surface dominates the background. A few scattered small objects lie on the table in the foreground. The lighting is dramatic, with a single light source illuminating the fruit and creating warm reflections on the metal surfaces.
